title: Demetrios #1216
definition:
Demetrius = "belonging to Ceres"

 1) a heathen silversmith at Ephesus
 2) a certain Christian, 3Jo 12
nasbUsage:
Definition: Demetrius = "belonging to Ceres"

 1) a heathen silversmith at Ephesus
 2) a certain Christian, 3Jo 12

    NASB:  Demetrius, the name of a silversmith and of a Chr.:
